hoorayhrusername.description: HoorayHR account email address, used as the username in the session-token login exchange.

hoorayhrpassword.description: HoorayHR account password. Used only in the /authentication login exchange body; never logged.

base_url.description: HoorayHR API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
